documentation:
# GAI SDK Setup Guide

## Install

1.  Clone Repository recursively

```bash
git clone https://github.com/kakkoii1337/gai-sdk --recursive
```

2. Update submodule branches

```bash
cd gai-sdk
git submodule foreach -q --recursive 'git checkout $(git config -f $toplevel/.gitmodules submodule.$name.branch || echo master)'
```

3.  Create conda env

```bash
conda create -n gai-sdk python=3.10.10 -y
conda activate gai-sdk
```

4.  Install Packages

```bash
poetry install
```

---

## Initialise

```bash
gai init
```

## Download model

```bash
gai pull exllamav2-mistral7b
```

## Start server

```
gai docker start
```

If it is successfully started, you will see the following:

```
INFO:     Application startup complete.
INFO:     Uvicorn running on http://0.0.0.0:12031 (Press CTRL+C to quit)
```

## Test

```bash
gai news
```

![demo](./doc/img/gai-cli.gif)

## Quick Start

Run [Quick Start Guide](./doc/1-quickstart.ipynb)

methods.name: gai.itt.client.itt_client.ITTClient.__init__
documentation: config is either a string path or a component config

classes.name: gai.ttt.client.completions.Completions

methods.name: gai.ttt.client.completions.Completions._generate_dict
documentation: Generate non stream dictionary response for easier unit testing

methods.name: gai.ttt.client.completions.Completions._stream_dict
documentation: Generate streamed dictionary response for easier unit testing
This class is used by the monkey patch to override the openai's chat.completions.create() function.
This is also the class responsible for for GAI's text-to-text completion.
The main driver is the create() function that can be used to generate or stream completions as JSON output.
The output from create() should be indisguishable from the output of openai's chat.completions.create() function.

class_variables.name: gai.lib.common.TextSplitter.Document.metadata
documentation:
Arbitrary metadata about the page content (e.g., source, relationships to other
documents, etc.).
Class for storing a piece of text and associated metadata.

classes.name: gai.lib.common.TextSplitter.TextSplitter

methods.name: gai.lib.common.TextSplitter.TextSplitter._split_text
documentation: Split incoming text and return chunks.

Splitting text by recursively look at characters.

Recursively tries to split by different characters to find one
that works.

methods.name: gai.lib.common.overlap_splitter.OverlapChunkSplitter.split
documentation: Max size of each chunk if 512
The text will be split into n chunks such that each chunk is less than 512k but the sum of any 2 chunks is greater than 512
Each chunk should also be as similar in size as possible.
